name: Monolithic Mega-Prompt
antiPatternSignals: Single agent with long agentInstructions, agentCanDelegate=false, no agents with agentType=supervisor or agentType=router, only one agent node handling all tasks, agentRole and agentGoal too broad or unset
positiveSignals: Multiple agents each with distinct agentRole and agentGoal, at least one agent with agentType=supervisor or agentType=router, agentCanDelegate=true on worker agents, each agent has focused agentInstructions

name: Agent-as-Business-Process Fallacy
antiPatternSignals: Agents replacing controlled processes without any toolCategory=workflow tools, no toolType=flow tools present, compliance-sensitive processes (complianceRequirements set) handled entirely by agents with no workflow or delivery tools
positiveSignals: Mix of agents and toolCategory=workflow tools, toolType=flow tools handling deterministic steps, toolCategory=delivery tools for controlled output, agents reserved for reasoning while workflows execute controlled steps

name: Invisible State
antiPatternSignals: Agents with agentMemory=none, no knowledge nodes connected for state persistence, long chains of agents with no knowledge sources, no tools for external state management
positiveSignals: Agents with agentMemory=shortTerm or agentMemory=longTerm or agentMemory=both, knowledge nodes connected for state storage, knowledgeRetrievalStrategy set to sql or api for state lookups

name: All-or-Nothing Autonomy
antiPatternSignals: Nodes with knowledgeRisk not set, no toolCategory=guardrail tools, no human nodes connected to high-risk agents, agents with knowledgeRisk=high and no human-in-the-loop, overallRiskLevel not configured on the project
positiveSignals: knowledgeRisk configured on nodes (low, medium, high), human nodes connected to agents with knowledgeRisk=high, toolCategory=guardrail tools at decision boundaries, humanAccessLevel and humanSLA defined on human nodes, overallRiskLevel set on the project

name: Passing As-Is Content Through the Model
antiPatternSignals: Agents handling sensitive content with no toolCategory=delivery tools connected, no toolCategory=processing tools for content pass-through, no human nodes with humanChannel configured for content verification
positiveSignals: toolCategory=delivery tools connected for verbatim content output, toolCategory=processing tools for content formatting, human nodes with humanChannel and humanRole configured for content review, humanInputChannel defined for verification workflows

name: Chasing Exotic Agent Patterns
antiPatternSignals: Many agents with agentType=orchestrator or agentType=specialist without clear justification, multiple agentType=router nodes when a single supervisor would suffice, high agent count relative to problem complexity, agentCanDelegate=true on all agents creating unnecessary delegation chains
positiveSignals: agentType matches task complexity (agentType=worker for simple tasks, agentType=supervisor for coordination), minimal agent count appropriate for the problem, agentType=specialist used only where domain expertise is required

name: Tool Soup
antiPatternSignals: Agents connected to 10+ tools, tools with overlapping toolCategory values connected to same agent, multiple toolType=mcp tools adding large tool surfaces to a single agent
positiveSignals: Each agent connected to 3-7 tools, tools have distinct toolCategory values per agent, different agents receive different tool subsets based on agentRole

name: Tool Data Overload
antiPatternSignals: Tools with empty toolInputs or toolOutputs, toolDataVolume not specified on high-volume tools, no toolCategory=processing or toolCategory=extraction tools in pipeline before agent consumption
positiveSignals: Tools have toolInputs and toolOutputs specified, toolDataVolume configured on data-heavy tools, toolCategory=processing tools filtering data before agents, toolCategory=extraction tools separating data retrieval from consumption

name: Agent Washing
antiPatternSignals: Agents with agentComplexity=deterministic (single deterministic operation that could be a tool), agents with agentType=worker connected to only one tool, agentComplexity=deterministic or agentComplexity=conditional where a toolType=flow or toolType=api would suffice
positiveSignals: Agents with agentComplexity=reasoning or agentComplexity=openEnded handling dynamic decisions, simple operations use toolType=flow or toolType=api nodes instead of agents, deterministic agents listed in structural observations are minimal or absent

name: Trust Before Verify
antiPatternSignals: Tools with toolAuthMethod=none especially toolType=mcp or toolType=api tools, no toolCategory=monitoring tools connected to external tool usage, toolIdempotent not set on state-changing tools
positiveSignals: Tools have toolAuthMethod=apiKey or toolAuthMethod=oauth or toolAuthMethod=bearerToken, toolCategory=monitoring tools present, toolIdempotent=true on safe-to-retry tools, toolCategory=security tools in the architecture

name: Happy Path Engineering
antiPatternSignals: Tools with toolErrorHandling=none, no tools with toolErrorHandling=retry or toolErrorHandling=fallback in the architecture, no alternative paths for tool failure, toolIdempotent not set on tools that might need retries
positiveSignals: Tools have toolErrorHandling=retry or toolErrorHandling=fallback or toolErrorHandling=skip or toolErrorHandling=abort configured, toolIdempotent=true on retryable tools, alternative tool paths exist for failure scenarios

name: Multi-Agent Chaos
antiPatternSignals: Multiple agents with empty agentRole or empty agentGoal, no agent with agentType=supervisor or agentType=orchestrator, agents with overlapping agentRole values, no shared knowledge sources for coordination
positiveSignals: Each agent has distinct agentRole and agentGoal, at least one agentType=supervisor or agentType=orchestrator present, human nodes with humanRole defined as escalation points, shared knowledge nodes connected to coordinating agents

name: Responsiveness Afterthought
antiPatternSignals: Tools with empty toolTimeout, deep nested agent chains with no agentLatencyBudget set, no toolCategory=caching tools in the architecture, toolAsync=false on long-running tools
positiveSignals: Tools have toolTimeout configured, agentLatencyBudget set on latency-sensitive agents, toolCategory=caching tools present, toolAsync=true on long-running tools, agentCostBudget set to constrain expensive operations

name: Unbound Execution Cost
antiPatternSignals: Agents with empty agentMaxIterations, no agentCostBudget set, no toolCategory=monitoring tools for cost tracking, all agents using the same agentModel without right-sizing
positiveSignals: Agents have agentMaxIterations configured, agentCostBudget set on agents, toolCategory=monitoring tools tracking cost metrics, different agentModel values for different complexity levels

name: Demo-Grade Agent in Production
antiPatternSignals: Agents with agentObservability=none, deploymentTarget not configured on the project, no toolCategory=monitoring tools, no toolCategory=security tools, no agentLatencyBudget or agentCostBudget set
positiveSignals: deploymentTarget set to cloud or onPrem or hybrid, agents with agentObservability=structured or agentObservability=full, toolCategory=monitoring tools present, toolCategory=security tools in the architecture, agentLatencyBudget and agentCostBudget configured

name: Mixing Extraction with Processing
antiPatternSignals: Single agent connected to both toolCategory=extraction and toolCategory=processing tools without separation, knowledge nodes with no knowledgeRetrievalStrategy feeding directly into processing agents
positiveSignals: Separate toolCategory=extraction tools followed by toolCategory=processing tools in pipeline, knowledge nodes with knowledgeRetrievalStrategy configured feeding extraction tools, clear pipeline from raw knowledgeContentType to processed output

name: Lazy Field Definitions
antiPatternSignals: Knowledge nodes with empty knowledgeDataFormats, empty knowledgeContentType, knowledgeLocation not specified, knowledgeAccessMethod not specified, knowledgeSensitivity not set on sensitive data
positiveSignals: Knowledge nodes with knowledgeDataFormats specified, knowledgeContentType defined, knowledgeLocation and knowledgeAccessMethod configured, knowledgeSensitivity set appropriately, knowledgeSizeQuantity documented

name: Using RAG for Whole-Document Operations
antiPatternSignals: Knowledge nodes with knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=rag used for counting or aggregation or structural operations, no knowledge nodes with knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=sql or knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=api for structured data
positiveSignals: Knowledge nodes with knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=sql or knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=api for structured operations, knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=fullDocument for whole-document tasks, knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=rag reserved for semantic search, knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=hybrid where both are needed

name: One-Size-Fits-All Chunking
antiPatternSignals: Multiple knowledge nodes with identical knowledgeChunkingStrategy, knowledge nodes with empty knowledgeChunkingStrategy, single knowledge node mixing different knowledgeContentType values without distinct chunking
positiveSignals: Different knowledge nodes with knowledgeChunkingStrategy tailored to their knowledgeContentType, knowledgeChunkingStrategy specified on all knowledge nodes using knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=rag, separate knowledge nodes for different knowledgeContentType values

name: No Guardrails
antiPatternSignals: No toolCategory=guardrail tools in the architecture, agents accepting input with no toolCategory=guardrail tools upstream, no toolCategory=security tools for input validation, no human nodes connected for review of high-risk outputs
positiveSignals: toolCategory=guardrail tools at input and output boundaries, toolCategory=security tools for validation, human nodes with humanRole configured for review of sensitive outputs, toolCategory=guardrail tools connected between agents and external toolType=api or toolType=mcp tools

name: Implicit Routing
antiPatternSignals: No agents with agentType=router, single agent handling all intents with no agentType=router or agentType=supervisor for dispatch, no toolCategory=routing tools visible
positiveSignals: Dedicated agentType=router agent present, domain-specific agentType=specialist or agentType=worker agents receiving routed requests, toolCategory=routing tools for intent classification, fallback agent connected to the router for unrecognized intents

name: No Evaluation Framework
antiPatternSignals: No toolCategory=testing tools in the architecture, no knowledge nodes serving as golden datasets, no toolCategory=monitoring tools tracking agent quality metrics
positiveSignals: toolCategory=testing tools present, knowledge nodes with knowledgeContentType describing test or evaluation data, toolCategory=monitoring tools tracking accuracy metrics, toolCategory=feedback tools collecting quality signals

name: Prompt Fragility
antiPatternSignals: Agents with agentPromptManagement=none or agentPromptManagement=hardcoded, prompts embedded directly in agentInstructions with no versioning, agents listed in structural observations as having no/hardcoded prompt management
positiveSignals: Agents with agentPromptManagement=templated or agentPromptManagement=versioned or agentPromptManagement=registry, prompt templates stored in knowledge nodes with knowledgeVersioningMethod configured, prompt changes managed through a registry

name: Bolted-On Human-in-the-Loop
antiPatternSignals: No human nodes in the architecture, no toolCategory=feedback tools for human input, agents with knowledgeRisk=high and no connected human nodes, no humanRole or humanChannel configured on existing human nodes
positiveSignals: Human nodes with humanRole and humanChannel configured connected to agents, humanInputChannel defined for interaction paths, humanSLA and humanAccessLevel set on human nodes, toolCategory=feedback tools for human-to-agent corrections, human nodes connected at design time to agents with knowledgeRisk=high or knowledgeRisk=medium

name: Stateless Between Sessions
antiPatternSignals: Agents with agentMemory=none, no knowledge nodes with knowledgeRetrievalStrategy for persistent storage, no knowledge nodes with knowledgeUpdateFrequency configured, humanBehaviors and humanLanguage not persisted across sessions
positiveSignals: Agents with agentMemory=longTerm or agentMemory=both, knowledge nodes with knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=sql or knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=api for session state, knowledgeUpdateFrequency set for state refresh, human node preferences stored in connected knowledge nodes

name: Flying Blind
antiPatternSignals: No toolCategory=monitoring tools in the architecture, agents with agentObservability=none, no toolCategory=monitoring tools for logging or tracing, agentObservability=none on all agents
positiveSignals: toolCategory=monitoring tools present for logging and tracing, agents with agentObservability=structured or agentObservability=full, toolCategory=monitoring tools connected to key decision agents, agentObservability=basic at minimum on all agents

name: No Caching Strategy
antiPatternSignals: No toolCategory=caching tools in the architecture, every request hitting agents without cached results, no tools with toolIdempotent=true flagged for safe caching
positiveSignals: toolCategory=caching tools present (semantic cache, result cache), tools with toolIdempotent=true identified as cacheable, toolCategory=caching tools connected between high-traffic agents and expensive toolType=api tools

name: Context Window Mismanagement
antiPatternSignals: Agents with agentContextStrategy=none especially those connected to many knowledge sources, agents listed in structural observations as having no context strategy, large knowledgeSizeQuantity knowledge nodes feeding directly into agents without filtering, no toolCategory=processing tools for context summarization
positiveSignals: Agents with agentContextStrategy=prioritised or agentContextStrategy=windowed or agentContextStrategy=compressed, toolCategory=processing tools for context summarization, knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=rag or knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=hybrid for selective retrieval, agents with agentContextStrategy set appropriately for their connected knowledge volume

name: RAG as a Black Box
antiPatternSignals: Knowledge nodes with knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=rag and no toolCategory=processing tools for query preprocessing, no toolCategory=extraction tools for reranking, knowledge nodes with empty knowledgeChunkingStrategy using RAG
positiveSignals: toolCategory=processing tools for query rewriting connected to knowledge nodes with knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=rag, knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=hybrid combining dense and sparse search, toolCategory=extraction tools for reranking, toolCategory=testing tools for retrieval evaluation

name: No Feedback Loop
antiPatternSignals: No toolCategory=feedback tools in the architecture, no toolCategory=monitoring tools for drift detection, no human nodes with humanBehaviors for providing corrections, agents with no improvement pipeline
positiveSignals: toolCategory=feedback tools for collecting ratings and corrections, toolCategory=monitoring tools for drift detection, human nodes with humanRole and humanInputChannel configured for providing feedback, toolCategory=testing tools for A/B testing or shadow mode evaluation

name: Security as an Afterthought
antiPatternSignals: Tools with toolAuthMethod=none on toolType=api or toolType=mcp tools, no toolCategory=security tools, no toolCategory=monitoring tools for audit trails, human nodes with empty humanAuthMethod or empty humanAccessLevel, knowledgeSensitivity not set on sensitive knowledge nodes
positiveSignals: Tools with toolAuthMethod=apiKey or toolAuthMethod=oauth or toolAuthMethod=bearerToken, toolCategory=security tools present, toolCategory=monitoring tools for audit logging, human nodes with humanAuthMethod and humanAccessLevel configured, knowledgeSensitivity set on all knowledge nodes

name: Cascade Latency Risk
antiPatternSignals: Deep chains of agents (supervisor→worker→tool→agent) where intermediate agents have no agentLatencyBudget, tools in multi-hop chains with empty toolTimeout, no toolAsync=true on tools called mid-chain, no toolCategory=caching tools between agents in sequential chains, agentType=orchestrator coordinating multiple sub-agents with no latency constraints
positiveSignals: agentLatencyBudget set on each agent in multi-agent chains, toolTimeout configured on all tools in sequential paths, toolAsync=true on long-running tools within chains, toolCategory=caching tools placed between frequently called agent-to-agent paths, fan-out patterns using parallel sub-agents rather than sequential chains

name: No Load Resilience Design
antiPatternSignals: No tools with toolErrorHandling=fallback in the architecture, critical-path tools with toolErrorHandling=none or toolErrorHandling=retry only (no fallback alternative), no toolCategory=caching tools for serving stale results under load, toolAsync=false on all tools (no ability to queue under pressure), no toolCategory=monitoring tools to detect saturation
positiveSignals: Tools with toolErrorHandling=fallback providing degraded-but-functional responses, toolCategory=caching tools that can serve stale results when backends are saturated, toolAsync=true on expensive tools allowing queue-based processing, toolCategory=monitoring tools for detecting throughput degradation, multiple tool paths with toolErrorHandling=skip allowing non-critical steps to be dropped under load

name: Knowledge Retrieval at Scale
antiPatternSignals: Knowledge nodes with large knowledgeSizeQuantity and no toolCategory=caching tools connected, knowledge nodes with knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=rag and no knowledgeChunkingStrategy (unoptimised for concurrent queries), multiple agents querying the same knowledge node with no toolCategory=caching layer, knowledge nodes with knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=fullDocument accessed by high-traffic agents
positiveSignals: toolCategory=caching tools between agents and large knowledge nodes, knowledgeChunkingStrategy configured on all knowledge nodes with knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=rag, knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=hybrid for knowledge nodes serving concurrent users, separate knowledge nodes for high-traffic vs low-traffic access patterns, toolCategory=processing tools for query preprocessing before knowledge retrieval

name: Missing Cost-Performance Baseline
antiPatternSignals: No agents with agentCostBudget set across the entire architecture, all agents using the same agentModel regardless of agentComplexity, no toolCategory=monitoring tools for cost attribution, agents with agentComplexity=deterministic or agentComplexity=conditional using expensive models, no toolCategory=caching tools to reduce repeated LLM calls
positiveSignals: agentCostBudget set on agents proportional to their agentComplexity, different agentModel values matched to agentComplexity (simpler models for agentComplexity=conditional, powerful models for agentComplexity=openEnded), toolCategory=monitoring tools tracking per-agent cost, toolCategory=caching tools reducing redundant LLM invocations, agentMaxIterations constraining runaway costs

name: Stateful Bottleneck Under Concurrency
antiPatternSignals: Agents with agentMemory=longTerm or agentMemory=both but no knowledge nodes for external state persistence, shared knowledge nodes with knowledgeAccessMethod implying single-writer (no concurrent access strategy), knowledge nodes with no knowledgeUpdateFrequency serving as state stores for multiple agents, no toolCategory=caching tools near stateful knowledge nodes
positiveSignals: State stored in knowledge nodes with knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=sql or knowledgeRetrievalStrategy=api (scalable backends), knowledgeUpdateFrequency configured on state-store knowledge nodes, toolCategory=caching tools for read-heavy state access patterns, separate knowledge nodes for per-session vs shared state, agents with agentContextStrategy=windowed to limit state accumulation

name: No Performance Observability
antiPatternSignals: No toolCategory=monitoring tools tracking latency or throughput metrics, agents with agentObservability=none or agentObservability=basic in production-targeted architectures (deploymentTarget set), no toolCategory=monitoring tools connected to agentType=supervisor or agentType=orchestrator nodes (bottleneck blind spot), no toolCategory=testing tools for performance regression detection
positiveSignals: toolCategory=monitoring tools with distributed tracing connected to multi-agent chains, agents with agentObservability=structured or agentObservability=full on critical path agents, toolCategory=monitoring tools connected to agentType=supervisor and agentType=orchestrator for bottleneck detection, toolCategory=testing tools for performance baselines, toolCategory=monitoring tools connected to toolType=api and toolType=mcp tools for external dependency tracking
